import numpy as np
import os

data_dir = os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR', '/data')

# Load data
train_target = np.load(os.path.join(data_dir, 'train_target.npy'), mmap_mode='r')
val_target = np.load(os.path.join(data_dir, 'val_target.npy'), mmap_mode='r')
val_input = np.load(os.path.join(data_dir, 'val_input.npy'), mmap_mode='r')

print(f'Train target shape: {train_target.shape}')
print(f'Val target shape: {val_target.shape}')
print(f'Val input shape: {val_input.shape}')

# Check target statistics
print('\n--- Val Target Statistics ---')
val_t = np.array(val_target[:100000])  # sample
means = np.mean(val_t, axis=0)
stds = np.std(val_t, axis=0)
print(f'Target means range: [{means.min():.6f}, {means.max():.6f}]')
print(f'Target stds range: [{stds.min():.6f}, {stds.max():.6f}]')

# Check which outputs have very low variance
for i in range(128):
    if stds[i] < 0.01:
        print(f'  Output {i}: mean={means[i]:.6f}, std={stds[i]:.6f}')

# Full val target variance
print('\n--- Full Val Target Variance ---')
val_full = np.array(val_target)
full_means = np.mean(val_full, axis=0)
full_vars = np.var(val_full, axis=0)
print(f'Variance range: [{full_vars.min():.10f}, {full_vars.max():.6f}]')

# Count near-zero variance outputs
near_zero = np.sum(full_vars < 1e-6)
print(f'Outputs with var < 1e-6: {near_zero}')
near_zero2 = np.sum(full_vars < 1e-3)
print(f'Outputs with var < 1e-3: {near_zero2}')

for i in range(128):
    print(f'  Output {i}: var={full_vars[i]:.8f}, mean={full_means[i]:.6f}')

# Check input statistics
print('\n--- Val Input Statistics ---')
val_in = np.array(val_input[:100000])
in_means = np.mean(val_in, axis=0)
in_stds = np.std(val_in, axis=0)
print(f'Input means range: [{in_means.min():.6f}, {in_means.max():.6f}]')
print(f'Input stds range: [{in_stds.min():.6f}, {in_stds.max():.6f}]')

# Check for near-zero variance inputs
for i in range(124):
    if in_stds[i] < 0.01:
        print(f'  Input {i}: mean={in_means[i]:.6f}, std={in_stds[i]:.6f}')
